历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 23578 → 24972 → 21589 → 21588 → 23214, fluctuating within the 21500-25000 range over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 23214, shifting back by about 1626 positions compared to 2024. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 93 in 2021 → 103 in 2022 → 102 in 2023 → 129 in 2024 → 134 in 2025, with a gradual expansion. The 2026 plan is 150, an increase of 16 (+11.9%) from 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 6 places from 63rd in 2025, with a continuously improving ranking that enhances appeal to high-scoring students. Ranked 7th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms and high application attention. Reputation evaluation is neutral to slightly positive, with no obvious negative public opinion; no records of enrollment gaps. Chemical Engineering and Technology rated A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials. Majors include Engineering Experimental Classes (Advanced Materials, Green Chemical Engineering, High-End Equipment, etc.), Computer Science, Automation, etc., highly correlated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have consistently high social heat. Traditional advantageous majors like Chemical Engineering and Materials fall under the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' category, with social opinion leaning towards discouragement, but this university is a top 211 in the industry with high professional recognition. The total number of Gaokao takers in the province in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025; estimated Physics Category takers about 380,000 based on historical proportions, with intensified competition. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, not a local university, with enrollment in Jiangsu accounting for about 3%-4% (recent data), making it an out-of-province enrollment with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation of historical rankings, the significant expansion in 2026 (+11.9%), and the substantial increase in total test takers (Physics Category about +45.6%), the expansion partially alleviates competition but the increase in test takers is larger. Combined with the rise in Soft Science ranking and increased attention from Douyin heat, the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is expected to continue shifting back from the 2025 baseline of 23214, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 25077, range 24577-25577.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were approximately 10,997, 11,380, 10,699, 10,041, and 10,979 respectively, fluctuating within the range of 10,000–11,400, with a 5-year average of about 10,819; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10,979, slightly lower than 2024, indicating a slight increase in competition; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Beijing was 14 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 14, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest A&F University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 76th in 2021 to 74th in 2022, 74th in 2023, 73rd in 2024, 71st in 2025, and 69th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation; in 2022, there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher, but recent reputation documents no longer include negative signals about the school; the school's overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 75th, rated as 'average', with low to medium exposure on short video platforms, showing no significant increase in application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grass Science were rated A-, totaling 4 A- disciplines, with distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics; among the enrollment majors, Biological Sciences, Food Nutrition and Health, and Veterinary Medicine are strongly related to the advantageous discipline clusters, attracting some candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The overall social popularity of related agricultural and forestry majors is stable; the total number of candidates in Beijing has been continuously increasing, from 42,037 in 2021 to 65,434 in 2025 and 84,900 in 2026, with an increase of about 29.7% from 2025 to 2026, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; the university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi Province, a western agricultural and forestry institution, with generally average regional preference among Beijing candidates; the local enrollment proportion is very small (only 14 Beijing candidates in 2025, accounting for a very low proportion of the university's total national enrollment), so regional factors have limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as historical rankings fluctuating within the 10,000–11,400 range, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a significant increase of about 29.7% in the total number of Beijing candidates, and the continuous improvement in the university's ranking, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with rankings slightly declining; the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 11,179, with a range of 10,679–11,679.
